title: juncus litorum
intro: Juncus litorum, also known as sea rush or salt rush, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is a salt-tolerant, grass-like plant that grows in coastal areas and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, Juncus litorum is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves that are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues.
